name: Can I get lost wages from work injury in Utah?

mainEntity.name: Can I get lost wages from work injury in Utah?

acceptedAnswer.description: Yes, temporary disability benefits cover 66-2/3% of average weekly wage during recovery.[6] Self-employed too. Key factors: (1) Prove inability via doctor; (2) Up to 312 weeks max; (3) Includes treatment time; (4) Permanent adds more. Submit pay stubs, tax returns. Lawyer ensures full calculation.
